welcome_subtitle: Participate in charity and help those in need. Making donations through our platform is now even easier.
feature_1_desc: Make your donation with just a few clicks.
feature_2_desc: Every donation is delivered targeted and transparently.
feature_3_desc: Our operators are ready to answer any of your questions.
step_1_desc: Find and launch the bot on Telegram via the link @Saxovat24_Bot.
step_2_desc: Select your preferred language and agree to the bot's terms.
step_3_desc: Choose different donation categories through the menu and make a difference.
about_bot_text: SahovatBot is a platform that makes charity accessible and easy for everyone. Our goal is to be a reliable bridge between donors and those in need of help. Every donation is guaranteed to reach its destination.
